mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, name, openid, phone, gender, id_number, pic, status, is_member, member_level, member_expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{openid}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{idNumber}, #{pic}, #{status}, #{isMember}, #{memberLevel}, #{memberExpireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
select id, username, name, phone, status, is_member, member_level, member_expire_time, create_time, update_time from user
and (name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') or username like concat('%', #{name}, '%'))
and phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and is_member = 1 and member_level > 0 and (member_expire_time is null or member_expire_time > #{now})
and ( is_member is null or is_member = 0 or member_level is null or member_level <= 0 or (member_expire_time is not null and member_expire_time <= #{now}) )
and is_member = 1 and member_level > 0 and member_expire_time is not null and member_expire_time <= #{now}
order by id desc

select id, username, name, phone, gender, status, is_member, member_level, member_expire_time, create_time, update_time from user
and (name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or username like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
and phone like concat('%', #{query.phone}, '%')
and status = #{query.status}
and is_member = 1 and member_level > 0 and (member_expire_time is null or member_expire_time > #{now})
and ( is_member is null or is_member = 0 or member_level is null or member_level <= 0 or (member_expire_time is not null and member_expire_time <= #{now}) )
order by id desc
